programmes.show_description: In October 2003, the San Diego County community was shaken by a tragic discovery: the dismembered legs of a woman were found in a dumpster. S6, Ep7
Kylie Dembrey from Berkshire fell for Mark Sinclair, unaware his charm hid a violent abuser. She kept the years of abuse secret, until he tragically murdered her. S3, Ep5
A GP surgery manager has blown NHS cash; and a fraudster cashes in on terror attacks. S2, Ep8
Sarah Stern had inherited a large sum from her mother, then one day she disappears, and suicide is suspected. S1, Ep3
Join Dr Bryanna Fox and her fellow experts as they investigate the behavioural red flags along Oscar Bolin's descent into a killer, whose secrets and crimes involved his own family. S1, Ep5
Investigators match orange fibres found at the scene of an atrocious sex-related killing with fibres found months later in a van. S5, Ep8
The body of Patrice LaBlanc surfaces in a Texas Lake. She's been stabbed 39 times. Her boyfriend Cliff Youens turned cutting remarks into a knife-wielding rage. S5, Ep1
A police motorcyclist, responding to an accident, crashes and becomes the patient himself. Plus, a conservationist tells what happened when he was attacked by elephants. S4, Ep11/20
An eleven-year-old boy survives a cardiac arrest in a swimming pool. Also, an unsuspecting woman is sandwiched between two cars. S4, Ep12/20
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
An American Bully dog allegedly comes flying out of his home and attacks a man and his toy poodle; multiple deep arm bites and vet bills come into play. S22, Ep182
When a woman sells her daughter a used car for a 25% profit and then repossesses it, her daughter reports it stolen and gets the police involved. S22, Ep183
An allegedly less than desirable tenant accuses her landlord of ignoring a rat infestation and stopping her mail. S22, Ep184
An unsuspecting man buying a car for his son never imagined that the car he was purchasing had a 3k title loan on it. S22, Ep185
Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S8, Ep152
Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S8, Ep153
Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S8, Ep154
Punchy reality show about a female judge that has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S8, Ep155
Brothers sue a headstone maker for a refund when they discover that the cemetery where they laid their mother to rest does not allow for them. S24, Ep58
An ugly divorce involving four children leaves ex-in laws fighting over family valuables allegedly lost due to missed storage unit payment. S24, Ep59
When gunshots ring out, a mother warns her kids and calls the police; her neighbour admits to shooting nearby but denies poaching from their property. S24, Ep60
A man pays up-front to house his two girlfriends in one bedroom then sues one of them for a security deposit payback and an allegedly false arrest. S22, Ep217
A college teacher is sued by her ex-lover for thousands of dollars in alleged loans; she claims he lived with her and broke her door down. S22, Ep218
A woman says she'll never forget the sound of her service dog screaming while allegedly being mauled by a friend's pet. S22, Ep219
A woman denies owing her grandmother money for extravagant Christmas shopping; she claims she played nursemaid for her family instead. S22, Ep220
A young girl is dragged to the ground after her leashed dog takes off and allegedly attacks a neighbour's pet; she maintains that she only lost control for a moment. S22, Ep221
A woman accuses her ex-friend of posting nude photos of her daughter on Facebook; her ex-friend says she's just mad she didn't get invited to a party. S22, Ep222
While visiting her grandkids, a woman says she was hit up for loans by her daughter who doesn't seem to care about payback. S22, Ep223
A woman sues her ex-lover for damages caused to a hotel room as a result of his temper tantrum; he claims her jealousy is to blame. S20, Ep5
A woman is relentless in her pursuit of payback for an accidental shrinking of her $50 pants; she denies keying a car over the incident. S20, Ep6
A woman suing for the return of her computer points the finger at her home-schooled niece who, in turn, points the finger at her imprisoned cousin. S20, Ep7
A woman admits that her small dog was off leash and not within her reach when it was attacked and almost killed by a neighbour's larger dog. S20, Ep8
At 15, James Fairweather, obsessed with murder, turned fantasies into reality. He killed two random strangers in Colchester before police stopped his terrifying spree. S3, Ep6
An IT Support Worker steals hospital computers; and a gang illegally fly-tip on a huge scale. S2, Ep9
Chester Turner violently assaulted and murdered several women, targeting those who were marginalised. This meant his killing spree long went undetected. S1, Ep6
In 1930, Alfred Rouse murders a drifter in Northamptonshire, and burns the body to fake his own death; but a witness, a wallet and a number plate convict him. S1, Ep5
Using witness testimony, new interviews, archive footage and dramatic reconstructions, Bloodline Detectives is a compelling and highly watchable series. S6, Ep8
At 15, James Fairweather, obsessed with murder, turned fantasies into reality. He killed two random strangers in Colchester before police stopped his terrifying spree. S3, Ep6
An IT Support Worker steals hospital computers; and a gang illegally fly-tip on a huge scale. S2, Ep9
In 1930, Alfred Rouse murders a drifter in Northamptonshire, and burns the body to fake his own death; but a witness, a wallet and a number plate convict him. S1, Ep5
Chester Turner violently assaulted and murdered several women, targeting those who were marginalised. This meant his killing spree long went undetected. S1, Ep6
The body of a man is found thirty years after he was murdered. Scientists try to decipher his blank address book, whose contents have faded with age. S5, Ep4
November, 2001 in Fort Worth, Texas, Loyd and Agnes Courtney were beaten and stabbed to death by their own daughter, Deborah Pieringer. Prosecutors say it was for money. S5, Ep2
A lorry driver whose vehicle overturned and caught fire after he was forced to swerve to avoid another motorist lives to tell the tale. S4, Ep13/20
A young man is kicked in the head by his girlfriend's horse and a British diver is lost at sea off the Australian coast for more than 22 hours. S4, Ep14/20
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
A woman claims poor health forced her to miss car payments to her aunt who is $9,000 in the hole because of her good deed. S22, Ep199
A woman claims that her next door neighbours tore her fence down in the middle of the night; police are called when their feud gets physical. S22, Ep200
An uninsured motorist claims she was held by another driver until police arrived after she allegedly hit his car; video of the collision is revealed. S22, Ep201
Nine police officers allegedly come to the rescue of women who accuse their roommate of assault; he is horrified by their claim. S22, Ep202
Lying teenagers, rocks thrown at cars from a bridge, and felony charges come into play when $7,000 in restitution fees is disputed by angry parents. S18, Ep1
Two young women attending a video game convention claim they were forced to sleep in their car after seven men showed up in the room they rented. S18, Ep2
A 14-year-old boy is accused of shooting out a woman's car windshield with a pellet gun. The boy denies the charge. S18, Ep3
A driver delivering honey is sued by her boss for taking the company car without permission and wrecking it. S18, Ep4
Decades after graduation, high school friends reconnect only to end up fighting over a large cash settlement and a custody battle. S24, Ep61
An ex-convict admits his 'hot as a pistol' online listing to attract women was a dumb idea; his ex-landlord breaks into tears because of her alleged fear of him. S24, Ep62
A woman is quick to post a bad review of a storeowner when she is unhappy with his work; he sues her for defamation. S24, Ep63
A woman says she was injured when steps gave way on her property because of an allegedly criminal contractor's shoddy work. S22, Ep224
A woman with 14 feral cats in her backyard sues her neighbour for the death of three of them by his large dogs. S22, Ep225
A woman gets emotionally overwrought when the Judge asks her to produce evidence to back up her shaky claims that a mechanic stole her car. S22, Ep226
A dog loses an eye while in kennel care because the animal was allegedly fed out of the same bowl as another pet and a dogfight ensued. S22, Ep227
A young vacationer seals his fate when he offers video evidence showing himself sailing over a man's roof on his snowmobile. S22, Ep228
A woman and her girlfriend claim ex-roommates backed out of their lease after an air quality issue that sent them all to a hotel. S22, Ep229
Divorcees lay out 10K to hire the best possible lawyer for their child then dispute who owes for that costly decision. S22, Ep230
A woman with a protective order against her ex-fiancé says she was too scared to call the police when he hit her vehicle with his car. S20, Ep9
Armed with a bat and a Pit Bull, a woman's stroll around the block ends with an attack by an unleashed dog and alleged ridicule from the pet's owner. S20, Ep10
An assault during a custody exchange at McDonald's takes place after a babysitter serves the mother of her client's children with papers alleging abuse. S20, Ep11
A dog-walking dispute escalates into a full-blown assault when a woman pepper sprays a puppy and its owners; she claims they beat her up in return. S20, Ep12
Nurse Beverley Allitt, the 'Angel of Death,' murdered four children and harmed nine others at Grantham Hospital in 1991, driven by a desperate need for attention. S3, Ep7
A scam artist faking disability to claim thousands of pounds; and the most prolific dental fraudster ever! S2, Ep10
Michael Gargiulo was dubbed the 'Hollywood Ripper' as well as the 'Chiller Killer' for the series of brutal murders he carried out. S1, Ep7
Defending herself against her husband Robert, Hazel Williams bludgeoned him to death. She then proceeded to hide his body in the cellar and told people he had left her. S7, Ep5
